title: SSH Brute Force Attack
story: An unusually high volume of SSH authentication failures has been detected against prod-server-01.
The failures began suddenly and are generating a significant spike in auth events.
Initial triage indicates a single external source is responsible.
Your task: investigate the incident and determine the scope of the attack.

objectives.label: Determine if the attacker gained access

hints: Use: index=hex_lab sourcetype=hex_case1_auth action=login_failure | stats count by src_ip | sort -count
Check for suricata alerts: index=hex_lab sourcetype=hex_case1_suricata | table src_ip signature
The attacker made a very large number of attempts — filter by event count threshold
splunk_queries: index=hex_lab sourcetype=hex_case1_auth action=login_failure | stats count by src_ip | sort -count
index=hex_lab sourcetype=hex_case1_auth action=login_success | stats count by src_ip
